targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT pct_positive, pct_neutral, pct_negative
  FROM dashboard.sentiment_${sentiment_interval}
  ORDER BY create_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 'positive' AS label, pct_positive AS value FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT 'neutral' AS label, pct_neutral AS value FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT 'negative' AS label, pct_negative AS value FROM latest;

SELECT
  create_time AS time,
  pct_negative AS "Negative",
  pct_neutral AS "Neutral",
  pct_positive AS "Positive"
FROM dashboard.sentiment_${sentiment_interval}
WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)
ORDER BY create_time;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT word_frequency
  FROM dashboard.sentiment_${sentiment_interval}
  WHERE word_frequency IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY create_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  word AS text,
  word_count::BIGINT AS value
FROM latest,
LATERAL jsonb_each_text(word_frequency) AS words(word, word_count)
ORDER BY value DESC, text;
